title: Trigger Message Start Event
description: Canonical inbound event for BPMN message start events. Upper adapters (Airtable webhook, Feishu, etc.) normalize external payloads and POST here.

messageRef.description: Must match startEvent.eventDefinition.messageRef on deployed processes

businessKey.description: Optional idempotency key; if omitted, derived from eventDefinition.correlationKey on the start event

variables.description: Trigger payload stored as process instance variables; used to evaluate eventDefinition.condition
